name: Saturn Transit over Sun — Ashtakavarga Father Indicator
description: When transit Saturn passes over the natal Sun or sensitive points with low Ashtakavarga bindus, father's health deteriorates. Saturn as natural maraka transiting over father-karaka Sun activates paternal crisis.

source_text.quote: When Saturn transits the sign of natal Sun with few bindus in Sun's Ashtakavarga, distress to the father occurs.

all_of: Transit Saturn is conjunct or in the sign of natal Sun
Sun's Ashtakavarga bindus in that sign are 3 or fewer

interpretation.meaning: Saturn's heavy transit over natal Sun directly afflicts the father-karaka. Low Ashtakavarga bindus confirm lack of protective support in that sign. Father faces chronic health crisis.

metadata.notes: Ashtakavarga-based transit. Saturn stays in a sign for 2.5 years; exact conjunction narrows to months.

name: Saturn Transit over Moon — Ashtakavarga Mother Indicator
description: When transit Saturn passes over the natal Moon or sensitive points with low Ashtakavarga bindus, mother's health deteriorates. Saturn transiting over mother-karaka Moon activates maternal crisis.

source_text.quote: When Saturn transits the sign of natal Moon with few bindus in Moon's Ashtakavarga, distress to the mother occurs.

all_of: Transit Saturn is conjunct or in the sign of natal Moon
Moon's Ashtakavarga bindus in that sign are 3 or fewer

interpretation.meaning: Saturn's heavy transit over natal Moon directly afflicts the mother-karaka. Sade-sati or dhaiyya over Moon triggers maternal health concerns when Ashtakavarga support is weak.

metadata.notes: Ashtakavarga-based transit. Particularly potent during Sade-sati over natal Moon.

name: Saturn-Rahu-Mars Transit 4th from Sun — Father Death Trigger
description: When transit Saturn, Rahu, or Mars are placed 4th from natal Sun (the house of end/grave from father), father's death potential is activated. Multiple malefics in this position intensify the danger.

source_text.quote: Malefics transiting the 4th from the Sun bring danger to the father, as the 4th is the house of end (8th from 9th).

any_of: Transit Saturn is in the 4th house from natal Sun
Transit Rahu is in the 4th house from natal Sun
Transit Mars is in the 4th house from natal Sun

interpretation.meaning: The 4th from Sun is the 8th from the 9th house (father's longevity house). Malefics transiting here attack the father's vitality. Multiple malefics simultaneously = critical danger.

metadata.notes: Jataka Parijata. The 4th from Sun = 8th from 9th logic. Mars transit is fastest (45 days).

name: Sun Transit Trine Moon's Navamsa Lord — Mother Event Window
description: When transit Sun forms a trine to the natal position of Moon's Navamsa dispositor, maternal events are triggered. The Sun illuminates the karmic maternal axis.

source_text.quote: When the Sun transits trine to the Navamsa lord of the Moon, events related to the mother manifest.

all_of: Transit Sun is trine (120 or 240 degrees) to the natal position of Moon's Navamsa dispositor

interpretation.meaning: Sun's monthly transit trine to the D9 dispositor of Moon activates maternal karma. This is a narrow timing trigger within a broader dasha window.

metadata.notes: Phaladeepika transit principle. Sun transits quickly (30 days/sign) — use as narrow window refiner.

name: Sun Transit Trine Lagna's Navamsa Lord — Father Event Window
description: When transit Sun forms a trine to the natal position of Lagna's Navamsa dispositor, paternal events are triggered. The Lagna Navamsa lord connects to the native's dharmic axis including father.

source_text.quote: When the Sun transits trine to the Navamsa lord of the Ascendant, events related to the father and self manifest.

all_of: Transit Sun is trine (120 or 240 degrees) to the natal position of Lagna's Navamsa dispositor

interpretation.meaning: Sun's monthly transit trine to the D9 dispositor of Lagna activates self/father karma. This narrows the timing window for paternal events within a broader dasha gate.

metadata.notes: Phaladeepika transit principle. Sun as father-karaka transiting trine to Lagna D9 lord.

name: Transit at Double Sun-Moon Difference — Mother Event Timing
description: When a transit planet reaches the degree equal to twice the natal Sun-Moon difference (a sensitive maternal point), maternal events are activated. This is a mathematical sensitive point technique.

source_text.quote: The point obtained by doubling the difference between Sun and Moon positions indicates timing of maternal events when activated by transit.

all_of: Transit Saturn or malefic is conjunct the point at 2 x (Sun longitude - Moon longitude) mod 360

interpretation.meaning: Mathematical sensitive point derived from luminaries. When malefics transit this degree, maternal axis is activated. Combines with dasha for timing confirmation.

metadata.notes: BPHS sensitive point technique. Empirical — requires more validation cases.

name: Transit at Mandi-Sun Difference Point — Father Event Timing
description: When a transit malefic reaches the sensitive point derived from the Mandi-Sun difference, paternal events are activated. Mandi (Gulika) is a malefic sub-planet that intensifies death-related significations.

source_text.quote: The difference between Mandi and Sun positions indicates the point of paternal crisis when activated by malefic transit.

all_of: Transit Saturn or malefic is conjunct the point at (Mandi longitude - Sun longitude) mod 360

interpretation.meaning: Mandi (son of Saturn) combined with Sun creates a paternal danger point. When malefics transit this degree, father's longevity is threatened.

metadata.notes: BPHS Mandi technique. Mandi calculation requires accurate birth time.

name: Transit at Yamakantaka-Sun Difference — Father Death Timing
description: When a transit malefic reaches the sensitive point derived from Yamakantaka-Sun difference, father's death timing is indicated. Yamakantaka is the sub-planet of Yama (death god).

source_text.quote: The difference between Yamakantaka and Sun indicates the point when the father's death may occur upon malefic transit.

all_of: Transit Saturn or malefic is conjunct the point at (Yamakantaka longitude - Sun longitude) mod 360

interpretation.meaning: Yamakantaka represents the death-dealing quality of Jupiter. Its difference with Sun creates a critical paternal mortality point. Transit activation by Saturn/Rahu triggers the event.

metadata.notes: BPHS Yamakantaka technique. Rare but potent when combined with dasha gate.

name: Transit at Moon-Mandi Difference Point — Mother Event Timing
description: When a transit malefic reaches the sensitive point derived from Moon-Mandi difference, maternal events are activated. Moon represents mother and Mandi adds malefic timing specificity.

source_text.quote: The difference between Moon and Mandi positions indicates the timing of maternal events when activated by malefic transit.

all_of: Transit Saturn or malefic is conjunct the point at (Moon longitude - Mandi longitude) mod 360

interpretation.meaning: Moon-Mandi sensitive point targets maternal longevity. When slow malefics transit this degree, mother's health is at risk. Most dangerous during active dasha gate.

metadata.notes: BPHS Mandi technique for maternal axis. Requires accurate Mandi calculation.
